name: dispatcher
description: Event-routing provider. Bundles and runs the dispatcher-ingress webhook service as a managed daemon, routing events to sessions or spawning ephemeral agents. Hands off to taskpilot for spawn:recipe targets and to session-bridge for session targets.

bearer_token.title: Ingress bearer token
bearer_token.description: Bearer token required on every ingress POST. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32

install_dir.title: Runtime directory
install_dir.description: Runtime state directory — venv, channels.yaml, recipes, agents, and the audit DB. The service code is bundled in the plugin.

port.title: Ingress port
port.description: Port for dispatcher to listen on. Default 8911.

session_bridge_url.title: Session-bridge URL
session_bridge_url.description: URL of the local session-bridge HTTP server. Used to forward events to named sessions.
